RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS INC.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set No One And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions. The request for further discovery is moot. ADDITIONAL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY WAS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ON JULY 26, 2010 AND THE MOTION WAS STILL FILED ON AUGUST 16 WHICH IS MOOT. NO SANCTIONS WAS AWARDED BY THE COURT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set No. One And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
